scores.noInspections: No inspections yet. Enable QI to auto-inspect calls on hangup.

We are a sales team, need to check if agents introduce themselves, mention product offers, avoid forbidden phrases like 'guaranteed profit', and assess service attitude.

modal.editNote: Note: Policies can be toggled directly in the table. User binding is managed from the Users page.

error.DUPLICATE_SIP_NUMBER: SIP number "{{sipNumber}}" is already assigned to another agent

agentsPage.capacityWarningDesc: You have reached or exceeded your core seat limit. Agents created during the 30-day grace period will be automatically disabled if capacity is not expanded.

modal.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

settingsPage.title: Platform Settings

policy.disabledDesc: Feature is turned off for all agents
policy.enforcedDesc: Feature is mandatory for all agents
policy.disabledHint: All agents will have this feature disabled
policy.optionalHint: Agents can individually enable/disable this feature
policy.enforcedHint: All agents will have this feature enabled (cannot be disabled)
policy.pcapDesc: Control packet capture for call recording. PCAP files enable detailed network analysis and quality monitoring.
policy.asrDesc: Enable real-time speech-to-text transcription during calls. Provides live transcripts and enables AI-powered features.
policy.summaryDesc: Automatically generate AI-powered summaries after calls end. Includes key points, action items, and sentiment analysis.
policy.assistantDesc: Control real-time AI suggestions during calls
policy.piiDesc: Select the mechanism used to sanitize Personally Identifiable Information before sending it to LLM endpoints.
policy.piiRegexDesc: Fast, pattern-based detection for phones, emails, and IDs. Zero latency impact.
policy.piiNerDesc: Uses NLP to contextually identify entities (Names, Orgs, Locations). Supports Chinese, English, and Japanese. If you have other language needs, please contact us.

ser.title: Speech Emotion Recognition
ser.description: Analyze emotional tone of calls using acoustic features. Supports real-time monitoring and post-call analysis.
ser.realtimeHint: Analyze during call. High CPU usage.
ser.postCallHint: Analyze after call ends. Queue based.
ser.autoHint: Switch to post-call if CPU > threshold.
ser.silenceHint: Low = more sensitive (detects more speech). High = filters more noise/silence.

avatar.title: Avatar Service
avatar.description: Choose an avatar provider for users without uploaded photos. Locally uploaded avatars always take priority.
avatar.preview: Preview — avatars will be resolved server-side after saving

asr.title: ASR Vendors
asr.name: Name *
asr.noVendors: No ASR vendors configured. Add one to get started.
asr.noVendorsAlt: No ASR vendors configured. Click "Add Vendor" to get started.

llm.title: LLM Vendors
llm.name: Name *
llm.mappingDesc: Assign specific vendors per service. Empty = use global Primary/Secondary.

postCall.title: Post-Call ASR
postCall.description: Process entire call recordings with batch ASR after the call ends. Results are stored separately from real-time transcripts.

smtp.title: System Email (SMTP Server)
smtp.saveSuccess: SMTP configuration saved. Some changes may require server restart.

notifications.title: System Notifications (Email)
notifications.description: Configure rules and default recipients for system event emails.

schema.title: Summary Schema Configuration
schema.description: Define custom fields for structured post-call summaries per client or use a global default.
schema.noSchemas: No schemas defined yet. Click "Add Schema" to create one.

settingsPage.note: Note: Changing policy settings will re-sync all agents. Activating an ASR vendor will hot-reload the Ingestion Engine — existing calls continue with the old config while new calls use the new one.

confirm.deleteAsrDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this ASR vendor? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteLlmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this LLM vendor? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSchemaDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this schema? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteStorageDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this storage provider? This will not delete the data in the bucket, but it will remove the connection.

storage.title: Data Storage Providers
storage.noProviders: No storage providers configured. Click "Add Provider" to get started.

systemConfig.title: System Configuration
systemConfig.subtitle: Manage deep system parameters, infrastructure endpoints, and global notification settings.
systemConfig.maintenanceModeDesc: Restrict access to admins only. Active sessions will be terminated.
systemConfig.debugLoggingDesc: Write extensive tracing data to standard out streams across microservices.
systemConfig.goServiceUrlDesc: The internal endpoint where the ingestion and processing Go backend is located.
systemConfig.hepDesc: Used by Traffic Replay to send HEP packets to IE. Host is derived from Go Service URL above.
systemConfig.serServiceUrlDesc: The endpoint for the Python AI microservice handling NLP, emotion recognition and text analysis.
systemConfig.appNodeUrlDesc: Self-referencing endpoint used for IE→AS internal webhook callbacks.
systemConfig.contextBriefDesc: Triggered strictly Just-In-Time when a call rings or a chat initiates. It performs a lightweight, real-time fetch of pending agent actions and the last 5 omnichannel messages to provide a 1-second tactical briefing string for the agent. Small talk is automatically excluded.
systemConfig.aiProfileDesc: A heavy, asynchronous extraction of the contact's overall lifetime health and sentiment trends. To preserve LLM tokens, this is calculated offline and decoupled from live call ringing.
systemConfig.thresholdActive: conversations required to trigger background recalculation.

rules.nlpDesc: Tell AI what you want to monitor, and we'll build the rule for you.
rules.noRules: No rules configured. Deploy a template or generate one with AI.
rules.smartBaselineDesc: AI is continuously modeling regular traffic to detect adaptive anomalies.
rules.noHistory: No recent alerts triggered by these rules.

channels.intranetNote: Intranet addresses (e.g. 10.x, 192.168.x) are allowed for on-premise deployments. However, for security reasons, cloud provider metadata endpoints (e.g. 169.254.x.x) are strictly blocked.
channels.livePreviewDesc: This is how alerts routed to this channel will look on the user's device.
channels.noPreview: No rich preview available for {{type}}. Will send as Markdown.

routing.ruleActiveDesc: Events will be routed to selected channels.
routing.rulePausedDesc: This routing rule is currently suspended.

QUAL_VIOLATION.label: Quality Violation
QUAL_VIOLATION.desc: Triggered when a call fails critical QA checks (e.g. compliance violations).

EMOTION_BURNOUT.label: Emotion Burnout
EMOTION_BURNOUT.desc: Triggered when agent or customer emotion drops below acceptable thresholds.

SYSTEM_DEGRADATION.label: System Degradation
SYSTEM_DEGRADATION.desc: Triggered by high latency, packet loss, or PBX connectivity issues.

RECORDING_UPLOAD_FAILURE.label: Recording Upload Failure
RECORDING_UPLOAD_FAILURE.desc: Triggered when a call recording fails to upload to cloud storage.

TEST_PING.label: Test Ping
TEST_PING.desc: Triggered manually to test notification channels.

all.label: ALL
all.desc: Receive alerts for any severity level.

info.label: INFO
info.desc: Everyday operational events, good to know.

warning.label: WARNING
warning.desc: Issues that need attention but aren't blocking.

ruleModal.durationHint: How long the condition must persist to trigger.

preview.feishuAction: Click to listen to this call immediately

errors.routeChannelRequired: At least one channel must be selected

placeholders.nlpPrompt: e.g. Alert me if the MOS score drops below 2.5 for 5 continuous minutes and ping the Sales Engineering group.

confirm.deleteChannelDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this alert channel? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteRouteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this routing rule? This action cannot be undone.

wfm.title: Workforce Management
wfm.subtitle: Schedule agents, monitor adherence, and forecast volume
wfm.criticalAlertMsg: {{count}} days this week have severe coverage gaps exceeding 15+ missing agents. SLA targets are at extreme risk.
wfm.zeroTouchDesc: No shifts scheduled. Let CXMind AI build an optimal schedule based on industry benchmarks and regional holidays for {{country}}.
wfm.gapDetected: Detected a critical gap of {{count}} agents at {{time}}.
wfm.strategyADesc: Shift 2 agents from trailing Overstaffed interval (-15m break shift).
wfm.strategyBDesc: Push instant 1.5x Overtime offer to 3 eligible offline agents via Copilot Mobile.
wfm.createShiftDesc: Manually schedule a custom block for the selected agent.
wfm.deleteShiftDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this shift? This action cannot be undone.

wfmAdherence.title: Live Adherence Dashboard
wfmAdherence.subtitle: Monitoring agent schedule vs. actual Copilot connection state
wfmAdherence.allAdhering: Agents are adhering to their schedules.
wfmAdherence.snapshotDesc: This panel will show a list of all agents currently scheduled to be on shift.

wfmApprovals.title: Shift Marketplace
wfmApprovals.pendingCount: You have {{count}} requests requiring your attention.
wfmApprovals.inboxZeroDesc: You've cleared all pending shift swaps and time-off requests. Time to grab a coffee ☕️.

wfmSettings.noHolidays: No holidays found for this region and year. Click "Auto-Import" to fetch.

actions.showingRecords: Showing {{filtered}} of {{total}} records from Audit Log.
actions.discoveryDesc: The system analyzes manual agent workflows to suggest new automation rules. Review and approve suggestions to instantly deploy them to your team.
actions.noPendingSuggestions: No pending suggestions. New recommendations will appear here.
actions.waitingForData: AI analysis will generate recommendations once enough call data is collected.
actions.defineCustomDesc: Manually configure a new intent and trigger logic
actions.createIntentDesc: Define a new action intent that the AI engine will detect during calls.
actions.schemaHint: Fields the AI will extract from the conversation

audit.dashboardSubtitle: Monitor system activity and security events
audit.logsSubtitle: View and filter system audit logs
audit.anomalySubtitle: AI-detected suspicious activities in the last 24 hours
audit.noAnomaliesDesc: System is running normally. No suspicious activities found in the last 24 hours.
audit.reportsSubtitle: Generate and export system usage and security compliance reports
audit.searchOperatorPlaceholder: Search by operator name or ID...

hint.dashboard: I'm on the Dashboard — I can analyze operational data for you
hint.monitoring: I'm on the Monitoring page — I can help find calls or agents
hint.analytics: I'm on Analytics — I can query SLA and trends
hint.map: I'm on the Agent Map — I can help manage zone layouts
hint.qi: I'm on Quality Inspector — I can query QI statistics
hint.audit: I'm on Audit — I can search operation logs

hint.contacts: I'm on Contacts — I can help find customer info

integrations.title: Integrations & Apps
integrations.subtitle: Connect CXMind with your favorite tools to maximize agent productivity.
integrations.salesforceDesc: Sync customer data, automate call logging, and bring Unified Customer Context to your agents.
integrations.zendeskDesc: Provide exceptional customer service with Zendesk tickets and user data integration.
integrations.hubspotDesc: Inbound marketing, sales, and service software integration for full funnel visibility.
integrations.intercomDesc: Provide personalized chat support and sync conversation histories directly back to CXMind.
integrations.gitlabDesc: Create issues, push logs, and sync devops context directly from customer conversations.
integrations.jiraDesc: Auto-create Jira issues from call events, quality scores, and alerts. Supports Cloud and Server/DC.
integrations.servicenowDesc: Create ServiceNow incidents automatically for compliance and escalations. Supports ITSM workflows.

jiraSetup.title: Jira Integration
jiraSetup.subtitle: Configure Jira to automatically receive tickets from CXMind events.

snSetup.title: ServiceNow Integration
snSetup.subtitle: Configure ServiceNow to automatically receive incidents from CXMind events.

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.dropHint: Drag & drop .txt, .md, or .pdf files here — auto-split into searchable chunks
knowledgeBase.noArticles: No articles yet. Create your first knowledge base article.
knowledgeBase.archiveConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this article? This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeBase.uploadSuccess: Uploaded {{count}} file(s) → {{chunks}} chunks created & indexing started
knowledgeBase.dimMismatchWarning: Vector dimension mismatch: collection uses {{actual}}d but current model expects {{expected}}d. Please delete all articles and re-upload to fix.

callQuality.title: Call Quality
callQuality.noMosData: No MOS data available for this period

assistantPage.title: AI Assistant
assistantPage.welcomeDesc: Ask me anything about your contact center — SLA metrics, agent status, call analytics, or manage your Agent Map layouts.

contactDetail.nextBestActionDesc: Issue $50 SLA Credit immediately via WhatsApp to prevent High Churn Risk.
contactDetail.injectDesc: Inject scenarios to override the context brief live. Auditable through backend logs.
contactDetail.noSemanticMemory: No Semantic Memory initialized for this contact.
contactDetail.noInteractionHint: Records of calls, chats, and Copilot actions will appear here.
contactDetail.audioError: Audio not available for this call
contactDetail.unmergeConfirmMessage: Are you sure? This will restore the source contact and revert associated communication logs.

agentMap.noFloorsHint: Create a floor via Manage Floors, or seed demo data to get started.
agentMap.fatigueDesc: {{name}} has been under high stress for >15s.

crmWizard.connectDesc: Supercharge your customer experience by combining CXMind's real-time AI with your {{name}} CRM data.
crmWizard.unifiedContextDesc: Instantly pull {{name}} records (Leads, Contacts, Opportunities) into the Copilot sidebar the moment a call connects. No more tab switching.
crmWizard.autoCallLoggingDesc: Automatically log transcripts, AI summaries, and call outcomes as Tasks or Cases directly tied to the correct record in {{name}}.
crmWizard.smartFieldUpdatesDesc: Let CXMind's LLM extract structured entities (like budgets or dates) from conversations to auto-update custom fields in {{name}}.
crmWizard.actionDraftsDesc: Trigger downstream workflows or send automated follow-up emails based on {{name}} data and AI-detected call sentiments.
crmWizard.oauthDesc: To connect CXMind, you need to create a Connected App in your {{name}} Organization. Please configure the Callback URL to:
crmWizard.dataMappingDesc: Map CXMind data fields to your custom fields in {{name}} Task/Activity objects.
crmWizard.simDesc: Trigger a mock call to see how {{name}} data pops up in the Copilot SidePanel and logs automatically.
crmWizard.readyToTrigger: Ready to trigger an incoming {{type}} from:

activeCalls.desc: Number of calls currently in progress on the platform
activeCalls.source: Real-time data pushed from the call processing engine
activeCalls.calc: Count of all active call sessions at this moment

totalCalls.desc: Total calls in last 24h, excluding internal (agent↔agent) and unknown calls
totalCalls.source: sip_calls_v VIEW — call_type NOT IN (internal, unknown)
totalCalls.calc: COUNT(*) WHERE call_type IN (system_inbound, system_outbound, agent_inbound, agent_outbound)

avgDuration.desc: Average talk time of answered calls (answer→end), excluding unanswered, internal, and unknown
avgDuration.source: sip_calls_v VIEW — last 3h, answered calls only
avgDuration.calc: AVG(end_time - answer_time) WHERE answer_time IS NOT NULL AND call_type NOT IN (internal, unknown)

usersAgents.desc: Number of registered user accounts and configured agents
usersAgents.calc: Total user count / Total agent count

avgMos.desc: Mean Opinion Score — voice quality rating on a 1-5 scale (5 = excellent)
avgMos.calc: Average MOS across all analyzed call streams

totalAnalyzed.desc: Total number of voice quality analysis reports generated
totalAnalyzed.calc: Count of all quality analysis reports in the selected period

poorQuality.desc: Percentage of calls with unacceptable voice quality (MOS below 2.0)
poorQuality.calc: Calls with MOS < 2.0 ÷ Total analyzed calls × 100%

regionsCount.desc: Number of distinct countries or regions with call activity
regionsCount.calc: Count of unique country codes in call data

conversionRate.desc: Percentage of calls that resulted in a successful outcome

aiAccuracy.desc: How accurately the AI predicts call outcomes compared to manual reviews
aiAccuracy.source: AI outcome predictions vs. manual audit results

sipErrors.desc: Trend of SIP protocol errors and timeout events over recent hours
sipErrors.calc: Count of 4xx/5xx errors and timeouts grouped by time interval

acdAsr.desc: Average Call Duration (ACD) and Answer Seizure Ratio (ASR) over time
acdAsr.source: Call event records from the analytics database
acdAsr.calc: ACD = average duration of answered calls; ASR = answered ÷ total attempts

mosDist.desc: Distribution of call quality scores across quality tiers
mosDist.calc: Calls grouped into Excellent (≥4.0), Good (3.0-4.0), Fair (2.0-3.0), Poor (<2.0)

qualityTrends.desc: Time-series trends of key quality metrics: MOS, packet loss, jitter, and round-trip time
qualityTrends.calc: Average values per time bucket over the selected period

codecPerf.desc: Comparison of voice quality metrics across different audio codecs
codecPerf.calc: Average MOS, loss rate, and RTT grouped by codec type

worstCalls.desc: Calls ranked by poorest voice quality for investigation
worstCalls.calc: Bottom N calls sorted by minimum MOS score

liveCalls.desc: Real-time list of all active calls with live quality metrics
liveCalls.source: Real-time data from call processing engine
liveCalls.calc: All currently connected calls with their latest metrics

trafficOrigins.desc: Geographic distribution of call traffic worldwide
trafficOrigins.calc: Call count and average quality grouped by country

regionalQuality.desc: Average voice quality comparison across geographic regions
regionalQuality.calc: Average MOS and call count per country/region

operations.desc: Overview of agent workforce status — who's online, on calls, or on break
operations.calc: Count of agents in each status category

platformAlerts.desc: Recent system warnings, anomalies, and threshold breach notifications
platformAlerts.calc: Triggered alerts sorted by severity and time

outcomeDistribution.desc: Breakdown of call outcomes: success, failure, follow-up, or unknown
outcomeDistribution.calc: Count of calls in each outcome category

outcomeTrends.desc: Daily trend of call outcomes over the recent period
outcomeTrends.calc: Daily count of success vs. failure outcomes

outcomeQuality.desc: Relationship between call voice quality and call outcomes
outcomeQuality.source: Cross-analysis of quality metrics and outcome predictions
outcomeQuality.calc: Success rate grouped by MOS quality tier

outcomeDuration.desc: How call duration relates to successful outcomes
outcomeDuration.source: Cross-analysis of call duration and outcome predictions
outcomeDuration.calc: Success rate grouped by duration ranges

outcomeSentiment.desc: Correlation between detected sentiment and call outcomes
outcomeSentiment.source: Cross-analysis of sentiment scores and outcome predictions
outcomeSentiment.calc: Success rate grouped by sentiment categories

topClosers.desc: Agents ranked by highest success/conversion rate
topClosers.source: AI-predicted call outcome data per agent
topClosers.calc: Agents sorted by (successful calls ÷ total calls)

outcomeTalk.desc: Impact of agent-to-customer talk ratio on call outcomes
outcomeTalk.source: Cross-analysis of talk patterns and outcome predictions
outcomeTalk.calc: Success rate grouped by talk ratio ranges

aiCostRoi.desc: Cost efficiency of AI predictions — total spend and cost per successful prediction
aiCostRoi.source: AI service usage and billing data
aiCostRoi.calc: Total API cost, tokens consumed, and cost per success

roiSummary.desc: Multi-dimensional ROI summary showing value generated by AI features
roiSummary.source: ROI analytics engine aggregating multiple sources
roiSummary.calc: Sum of savings across duration, ASR cost, revenue, and compliance

bentoOverview.desc: A high-speed executive map tracking overall health from core infrastructure up to AI model performance
bentoOverview.source: Aggregated from TSDB series, ClickHouse analytics, real-time App Server metrics, and Edge AI (WebNN) runtimes
bentoOverview.calc: Comprehensive mesh of active sessions, 12h volume trends, acoustic SER alerts, and LLM intervention rates

leaderboardWall.desc: Agent performance leaderboard showing top performers
leaderboardWall.calc: Agents ranked by composite performance score

morningBrief.desc: AI-generated daily briefing summarizing yesterday's key metrics and today's priorities
morningBrief.source: AI analysis of recent call data and trends
morningBrief.calc: Natural language summary generated from analytics data

inboundOverview.desc: System-level inbound call metrics — total, answer rate, avg wait/talk time, abandoned count, and seat reach rate
inboundOverview.calc: Total = COUNT, Answer Rate = answered/total, Avg Wait = AVG(answer_time - start_time), Avg Talk = AVG(end_time - answer_time), Abandoned = unanswered, Seat Reach Rate = agent_answered / system_inbound_total

outboundOverview.desc: System-level outbound call metrics — total, answer rate, avg ring/talk time, and abandoned count
outboundOverview.calc: Total = COUNT, Answer Rate = connected/total, Avg Ring = AVG(answer_time - start_time), Avg Talk = AVG(end_time - answer_time), Abandoned = unanswered

didCid.desc: Top 10 DID (inbound destinations) and CID (outbound caller IDs) by call volume today
didCid.source: sip_calls_v VIEW — system_inbound callee / system_outbound caller (today, TZ-aware)
didCid.calc: GROUP BY number, ORDER BY count DESC, LIMIT 10

hourlyVolume.desc: Call volume distribution by hour of day — identifies peak traffic windows
hourlyVolume.calc: GROUP BY toHour(start_time, user_tz), 0-23 hours filled

durationDist.desc: Call duration distribution in 4 buckets — shows service time patterns

auditTotalEvents.desc: Total number of auditable actions recorded on the platform
auditTotalEvents.calc: Count of all audit events in the database

auditTodayActivity.desc: Number of audit events recorded today
auditTodayActivity.calc: Count of audit events from today's timeline data

auditActiveUsers.desc: Number of distinct users who performed actions
auditActiveUsers.calc: Count of unique operator IDs across audit categories

auditFailedLogins.desc: Number of failed authentication attempts detected

auditByCategory.desc: Distribution of audit events across operation categories
auditByCategory.source: System audit log grouped by category
auditByCategory.calc: Count of events per category (auth, user mgmt, etc.)

auditTimeline.desc: Hourly pattern of audit activity throughout the day
auditTimeline.source: System audit log grouped by hour
auditTimeline.calc: Event count per hour of the day

auditTopOperators.desc: Most active users on the platform by action count
auditTopOperators.source: System audit log grouped by operator
auditTopOperators.calc: Users ranked by total number of actions performed

auditRecentLogs.desc: Most recent audit log entries for quick review
auditRecentLogs.source: System audit log sorted by time

roiTotalValue.desc: Total dollar value generated by AI-powered features in this period
roiTotalValue.calc: Sum of all ROI metric values

roiTrend.desc: Daily trend of total ROI value over the selected period

roiBreakdown.desc: Daily ROI contribution broken down by each metric type
roiBreakdown.calc: Stacked daily values for duration, ASR, revenue, and compliance savings

slaTotalCalls.desc: Total number of calls processed in the selected date range
slaTotalCalls.calc: Count of all call events in the selected period

slaAnswerRate.desc: Percentage of incoming calls that were answered by an agent

slaAbandonRate.desc: Percentage of calls abandoned by callers before being answered

slaAvgWait.desc: Average time callers waited before being connected to an agent
slaAvgWait.calc: Average of all call wait times in the period

slaAvgHandle.desc: Average time agents spent handling each call (talk + wrap-up)
slaAvgHandle.calc: Average of all call handle times in the period

slaServiceLevel.desc: Percentage of calls answered within 20 seconds — a standard SLA metric

slaGauges.desc: Visual gauges for the three key SLA metrics at a glance
slaGauges.calc: Answer Rate, Abandon Rate, and Service Level as radial gauges

slaHourly.desc: Call volume broken down by hour of the day to identify peak times
slaHourly.calc: Answered and abandoned calls grouped by hour (0-23)

slaVolume.desc: Daily call volume trend over the selected period
slaVolume.calc: Total and abandoned calls per day

slaHeatmap.desc: Cross-tabulation of call quality and caller sentiment
slaHeatmap.source: Cross-analysis of quality metrics and sentiment analysis
slaHeatmap.calc: Call count for each sentiment × quality score bucket combination

slaAgentLeaderboard.desc: Agent performance ranking by calls handled, quality, and conversion
slaAgentLeaderboard.calc: Agents sorted by calls, AHT, QI score, and conversion rate

outcomeTotalPredictions.desc: Total number of AI outcome predictions made in this period
outcomeTotalPredictions.calc: Count of all predictions (success + failure + follow-up + unknown)

outcomeConversionRate.desc: Percentage of calls predicted as successful outcomes

outcomeModelAccuracy.desc: How well AI predictions match manual quality audits
outcomeModelAccuracy.source: Comparison of AI predictions vs. manual audit results

outcomeAiCost.desc: Cost of AI services per successful prediction
outcomeAiCost.source: AI service billing and outcome data
outcomeAiCost.calc: Total API cost ÷ Number of successful predictions

summaryTotalSummaries.desc: Total number of AI-generated call summaries in this period

summaryAvgTokens.desc: Average number of AI tokens consumed per summary
summaryAvgTokens.calc: Total tokens used ÷ Number of summaries

summaryTopModel.desc: Most frequently used AI model for generating summaries
summaryTopModel.calc: Model with the highest summary count

intentDistribution.desc: Distribution of caller intents detected by AI across all calls
intentDistribution.calc: Count of calls per intent category

sentimentTrend.desc: Daily trend of positive, neutral, and negative sentiment in calls
sentimentTrend.calc: Daily count of calls by sentiment category

topicCloud.desc: Most frequently discussed topics across all conversations
topicCloud.source: NLP topic extraction from call summaries
topicCloud.calc: Word frequency analysis weighted by topic importance

talkRatio.desc: Breakdown of conversation time: agent talk, customer talk, and silence
talkRatio.calc: Percentage of call time in each category

stressScore.desc: Daily trend of agent stress levels detected from voice patterns
stressScore.calc: Average stress score and talk ratio per day

emotionDistribution.desc: Distribution of emotions detected in call audio (happy, neutral, sad, etc.)
emotionDistribution.calc: Count of emotion classifications across all analyzed audio

emotionTrend.desc: Daily trend of acoustic emotions detected in call audio
emotionTrend.calc: Daily count of each emotion type

roiMetric_call_duration_saved.desc: Time saved through AI-optimized call routing and handling
roiMetric_call_duration_saved.calc: Baseline avg duration − AI-optimized avg duration × call count

roiMetric_asr_cost_saved.desc: ASR (speech recognition) cost reduction via smart routing
roiMetric_asr_cost_saved.calc: Avoided ASR processing minutes × cost per minute

roiMetric_revenue_attributed.desc: Revenue attributed to AI-driven successful conversions
roiMetric_revenue_attributed.source: AI outcome predictions + CRM revenue data

roiMetric_compliance_risk_avoided.desc: Estimated penalty costs avoided by AI compliance monitoring
roiMetric_compliance_risk_avoided.calc: Detected violations × average penalty cost per violation

roiMetric_acw_time_saved.desc: After-call work time reduced by AI-generated summaries
roiMetric_acw_time_saved.source: ACW timing data from agent sessions
roiMetric_acw_time_saved.calc: Manual ACW avg − AI-assisted ACW avg × call count

roiMetric_fte_equivalent.desc: Full-time equivalent labor savings from all AI automations
roiMetric_fte_equivalent.source: Aggregate time savings across all metrics
roiMetric_fte_equivalent.calc: Total hours saved ÷ standard working hours per FTE

roiMetric_customer_ltv_rescued.desc: Customer lifetime value preserved by AI churn intervention
roiMetric_customer_ltv_rescued.source: Churn prediction model + CRM customer data
roiMetric_customer_ltv_rescued.calc: At-risk customers saved × average customer LTV

setup.languageDesc: Choose the default language for the platform and seed data
setup.companyDesc: Set your company name, timezone, and optionally change the admin password
setup.emailDesc: Configure SMTP so CXMind can send reports, alerts, and password resets.
setup.smtpSecure: Use Secure (TLS/SSL) — Often port 465 requires true, 587 requires false
setup.smtpAppPasswordHint: If using Google/M365, use an App Password
setup.testFailed: Failed. Adjust settings and try again.
setup.modulesDesc: Enable the modules you need. You can change this later in Settings.
setup.reimportSeed: Import default data (Action Templates) for selected language
setup.seedWarning: This will overwrite existing Action Templates with defaults.
setup.seedDemoDesc: Dashboard will be populated with simulated SIP calls and quality metrics.
setup.confirmDesc: Review your settings and launch CXMind

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Manage access control and define custom roles.
roles.name: Role Name

calls:listen.name: Listen Calls
calls:listen.description: Play audio recordings & listen to live calls

calls:export.name: Export Calls
calls:export.description: Export call data and audio files

quality:write.name: Manage QA
quality:write.description: Manage QA rules and resolve disputes

stages.title: Contact Stages
stages.description: Manage the lifecycle stages that contacts flow through.

error.minStages: At least one contact stage is required.
error.duplicateId: A stage with this ID already exists.

reset.title: Import Default Stages
reset.message: This will replace all your current custom stages with the default system pipeline configuration. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?

stages.idHelp: must be unique and cannot be changed later.

agentStatus.title: Agent Statuses
agentStatus.description: Manage custom agent statuses displayed in Agent Map and Operations Overview.
agentStatus.duplicateId: A status with this ID already exists.
agentStatus.resetMsg: This will replace all custom statuses with the default system configuration. Custom statuses will be lost.
agentStatus.deleteMsg: Delete this custom agent status? Agents currently using it will revert to Available.
agentStatus.idHelp: Must be unique, lowercase, no spaces. Cannot be changed later.
agentStatus.typeHelp: Determines how this status is grouped in reports and whether the agent receives calls/chats.

emotionAnchors.title: Emotion Anchors
emotionAnchors.description: Define anchor texts for each emotion. The system uses cosine similarity to classify customer text into these categories. More anchor texts improve accuracy.
emotionAnchors.testPlaceholder: Type a customer message to test emotion matching…
emotionAnchors.testError: Classification failed or model not loaded

transcript.errNoTranscripts: ASR completed but yielded no transcripts
transcript.diffNeedBoth: Need both realtime and post-call transcripts to show diff

sopLibrary.title: SOP Blueprint Library
sopLibrary.subtitle: Discover and clone out-of-the-box workflow blueprints designed for industry best practices.
sopLibrary.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this SOP?
sopLibrary.noResults: No blueprint found matching your search.

demo.title: CXMind AI Demo
demo.subtitle: Interactive showcase of CXMind's core AI capabilities. Upload audio files or use preset examples to see real-time inference.

callDetailsPage.noPcap: PCAP recording not enabled for this call
callDetailsPage.noRtcp: No RTCP data available for this call.
callDetailsPage.dtmfRequiresPcap: Full PCAP recording is required for DTMF analysis.
callDetailsPage.dtmfNoEvents: No DTMF events found in this call.
callDetailsPage.dtmfParsedFrom: Parsed offline from full PCAP (RFC 2833 / PT 101)

audioPlayer.errorNoRtpDesc: This PCAP contains SIP signaling only — no RTP audio was captured.
audioPlayer.errorFfmpegMissingDesc: Server is missing ffmpeg. Contact your system administrator.
audioPlayer.errorGenericDesc: An error occurred while processing the audio. You can retry or check the server logs.

groups.deleteGroupDesc: Delete this group? Agents will be unassigned.
groups.noGroups: No groups yet. Create your first group to organize agents.
groups.formCodeNote: Code cannot be changed after creation

supervisors.noSupervisors: No supervisors found. Create supervisor accounts from the Users page.
supervisors.noGroupsAvailable: No groups available. Create groups first.

trafficReplay.title: Traffic Replay & Baseline Testing
trafficReplay.description: Automate your regression testing. Upload physical PCAPs and assert the expected database state without writing code.
trafficReplay.runDescription: Executes all stored scenarios iteratively, simulating physical PCAP traffic and checking the database for snapshot drifts.
trafficReplay.recordDescription: Upload a PCAP to extract Call states and save to the Git baseline test suite.
trafficReplay.callIdHint: Leave empty to auto-detect all Call-IDs from PCAP
trafficReplay.deleteScenarioDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the scenario "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone unless you have committed it to Git.

intentManagement.title: Routing Intents
intentManagement.description: Define routing intents with example texts. The system computes centroids from examples and uses them to classify incoming messages and assign priority.
intentManagement.name: Name
intentManagement.empty: No routing intents configured. Run the Setup Wizard or add intents manually.
intentManagement.testPlaceholder: Type a customer message to test intent matching…
intentManagement.testError: No match or MiniLM not loaded
intentManagement.deleteDesc: Delete this routing intent? This action cannot be undone.

omni.title: Omnichannel & Bot Configuration
omni.subtitle: Configure global AI bot behaviors and connect external channels to the SIP engine.

bot.title: Omnichannel Bot (RAG + LLM)
bot.description: When enabled, new conversations are handled by the AI Bot first. The bot answers using knowledge base articles (RAG) and LLM. If confidence is low or the customer requests, it hands off to a human agent.
bot.maxTurnsHint: Bot will hand off to human after this many turns
bot.confidenceHint: Below this RAG score, bot hands off to human

email.removeDesc: Are you sure you want to completely remove this email adapter? Existing conversations imported from this address will remain, but no new emails will be processed.

test.kakaoConfigured: Kakao credentials configured ✓ (live test requires webhook)
test.kakaoFailed: Kakao test failed: missing App Key or Sender Key

licenseSettings.title: License & Entitlements
licenseSettings.subtitle: Manage your system seat capacity, hardware bindings, and burst policies.
licenseSettings.planDescription: Manage your system seat entitlements and module access.
licenseSettings.burstSeatsDesc: Extra seats can be dynamically generated up to this limit but will expire 30 days after creation.
licenseSettings.onlineDesc: Activate using a License Key provided by the vendor. This server requires internet access to connect to the sonicwell.com licensing server.
licenseSettings.offlineDesc: For environments without internet access. Export the machine fingerprint to generate a certificate payload out-of-band.

toast.enterCert: Please paste the offline certificate data

vectorDb.saveError: Failed to save Vector DB configuration
vectorDb.title: Vector Database (RAG)
vectorDb.description: Configure the vector database used for Knowledge Base semantic search (RAG). Default: system Qdrant instance.
vectorDb.sdkWarning: ⚠️ {{provider}} SDK integration coming soon. Config will be saved for future use. Currently only Qdrant-compatible endpoints are fully supported.

conversationMonitor.workspaceFull: Workspace is full. Showing latest 6 streams.
conversationMonitor.transferModalDesc: Select an agent to force-assign this conversation to.
conversationMonitor.closeModalDesc: Are you sure you want to force close this conversation? This will immediately end the session for both the agent and the customer.

omnichannelTemplates.description: Manage rich media message templates for WebChat, Email, WhatsApp, etc.

omnichannelTemplates.deleteModalDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.
omnichannelTemplates.mockVariablesWarning: Mock variables (Test User, Demo Variable, etc.) will be automatically injected for this test.
omnichannelTemplates.testFailed: Failed to dispatch test message. Check console.

distillationLogs.title: LLM Distillation Logs
distillationLogs.subtitle: Raw LLM prompts and responses collected for model distillation fine-tuning.
